Before You Book
IS THIS FOR YOU?

This is a private, highly specific program. Before you book your call, read this carefully to make sure this is the right fit.

✅ This Is For You If...

You are a career-driven professional woman — specifically in healthcare, corporate leadership, or any high-stakes environment where mistakes carry serious consequences. And right now:

✅
You are a doctor, nurse, executive, or corporate leader operating at a high level — and you are excelling at work while completely falling apart at home.
✅
You are going through a separation, divorce, or just got divorced — or you are living as roommates in your marriage with zero real connection.
✅
You are in a hostile or emotionally unavailable relationship where your needs are not being met — and it is draining everything you have left.
✅
You are not burnt out because of workload. You are burnt out because your home life is in crisis — and you are running on autopilot 24/7.
✅
You are exhausted from being everyone's everything — the strong one, the capable one, the dependable one — but nobody is carrying you.
✅
You are ready to stop surviving on autopilot and start building — and you want a clear blueprint for who you actually are and what you actually want.
⚠️ This is not for you if...
You are looking for a quick fix, not committed to 30 minutes per day for 4 days, or you are not currently experiencing a relationship or home life crisis. This program requires full honesty and full participation.

If you read that list and felt seen — this was written for you. Book your free 30-minute assessment below.

I Qualify — Book My Free 30-Min Assessment →
Coach Marckenson
Strategic Interventionist · Life & Relationship Coach

Have you ever had everything going right in your life — and then one little obstacle turned it all crashing down?

That was me four years ago.

What started as a small infection rushed me to the hospital. Right before it, everything in my life was going great. My relationships. My work. My business. My well-being. I was really happy with everything that was happening.

Then one small thing caused everything to switch. To flip.

From there I got burnt out and exhausted. Because I didn't have a Blueprint. I didn't have a system that supported who I was. I was running on fumes. And everything I had worked so hard for started to collapse — my well-being, my work, my relationships. Because I didn't know I needed a Blueprint to support myself, my work, and my relationships.

That's when I discovered the truth nobody is telling you as a professional: your well-being, your work, and your relationships are interconnected. When one is broken, the others overcompensate. And that's what leads to burnout, anxiety, exhaustion, and running on autopilot.

And here's what stopped me cold — I had already spent 14 years studying human behavior, psychology, and faith-based transformation. I had trained directly in the world-leading Tony Robbins & Cloe Madanes Strategic Intervention Method. I had overcome a 10-year toxic relationship and healed my own childhood trauma from being kicked out twice in less than one week at 17 — without spending years in therapy. And I still hit burnout. Because I didn't have a Blueprint.

So I built one.

The same Blueprint that's helped me — and now helps my clients, professional women in healthcare and corporate leadership — end burnout and anxiety at the root. Especially while they're going through a separation, a divorce, or a home life crisis — completely disconnected in their own relationship at home.

That's why I created the 4-Day Blueprint Reset Challenge.

So you can experience the same reset — privately, one-on-one with me, 30 minutes a day for 4 days — and walk away with your own Blueprint to support your well-being, your work, and your relationships.

See if you qualify ↓

The Process
HOW THE 4-DAY RESET WORKS

This is not a group program. Not a webinar. Not another course.

It's a private, one-on-one 4-day challenge — just you and Coach Marckenson — 30 minutes a day. By Day 4 you will have a clear blueprint and the tools to protect it.

01
Day 1 · Reveal
Find the Real Source
We diagnose the real root of your burnout. Your well-being, work, and relationships are interconnected. We identify exactly where yours broke.
Breakthrough: You stop blaming yourself and see the actual source for the first time.
02
Day 2 · Reevaluate
Expose the Hidden Pattern
We identify the hidden survival pattern — people-pleasing, over-giving, conflict avoidance — that is now destroying your relationships and health.
Breakthrough: You see the pattern clearly. It's not who you are — it's what you learned.
03
Day 3 · Redefine
Get Clear on What You Want
We stop running from pain and start moving toward what's actually yours. You'll define — possibly for the first time — the relationship and life you actually deserve.
Breakthrough: A clear picture of the life waiting for you on the other side.
04
Day 4 · Reconnect
Build Your Daily Protocol
You will get triggered. The women who transform have a daily blueprint that keeps them regulated so they stop making permanent decisions from temporary pain.
Breakthrough: A personal protocol to stay grounded no matter what pressure hits.

Common Questions
BEFORE YOU BOOK
Is the 30-minute assessment really free?
Yes. 30 minutes, no cost, no obligation. It exists to make sure this is genuinely the right fit before we go further. If we're a match, you'll be personally invited into the private 4-day Blueprint Reset Challenge.
What happens after the 4-day Challenge?
By Day 4 you walk away with a Personal Blueprint and a daily protocol. If you want to go deeper, we'll talk about ongoing 1:1 work. There's no pressure — many women take their Blueprint and run with it on their own.
I've tried therapy. How is this different?
Therapy and coaching aren't the same thing. Therapy is a long, careful unpacking. Strategic Intervention is direct, action-based, and aimed at the root cause — not symptom management. Many of my clients have done years of therapy and tell me change arrives faster here because we move toward what you want, not just away from what hurts.
I'm a nurse / doctor / executive — I have no time. Is 30 minutes a day realistic?
It's the entire reason the Challenge is built this way. 30 minutes a day for 4 days. If you can't carve out 30 minutes for the thing that lets you keep doing everything else, this isn't the right time — and that's an honest answer worth knowing.
Do you only work with women?
My current focus is women in corporate and healthcare leadership because that's where the deepest transformation is showing up right now. I still work with select men and couples by referral.
What does ongoing work cost if I want to continue?
My core 1:1 program is a 90-day intensive. We only discuss it if you want to continue after the Challenge — and only if it's the right fit for both of us.
